name: Bacon and Onion Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry bacon until crisp in a skillet. Remove with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
2. Saute onion in 1 tablespoon of bacon drippings until tender (do not brown). Set aside to cool.
3. Sift flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt into a large mixing bowl.
4. In a small bowl, combine eggs, milk, and sour cream; blend well. Add the dry ingredients gradually, stirring just enough to moisten. Stir in the bacon and sauteed onion until combined.
5. Spoon batter into greased 2 1/2-inch muffin pan cups, filling them about two-thirds full. Sprinkle with sesame seeds.
6. Bake at 375 degrees F for 18 to 20 minutes or until golden brown. Serve hot with homemade jelly or jam.
